title: Robin Chooses Life
description: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Franky, Rob Lucci, Blueno, Zoro, Sanji. The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Hey, you... you ain't hurt, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Idiots, what are you doing!!? Capture them!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: recapture them! Don't let 'em get away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky is there, too, isn't he?

summary: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
